results.name: Crypto🧊house
results.bio: Crypto Chart Analyst 📈| $AKT & DePIN Alpha | Daily Charts + Dip Calls | 8+ Years Trading | Not Financial Advice | MEXC Partner → mexc-3WJaN | DM for collabs
results.text:
So many good Crypto projects have failed since 2022. The main reasons, in my opinion:

1. Lack of liquidity
2. Poor marketing
3. Not having a good advisor who actually understands crypto fundamentals (instead hiring based on degrees)
4. Poor timing ⏱️

#web3‌‌ #crypto
